name: python3-libolecf

summary: OLE2 Compound File format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
OLE2 Compound File format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libolecf is a library to access the OLE 2 Compound File (OLECF) format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libolecf.
